title: Shoppers Stop is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Shoppers Stop is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
